response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and technologies, but his primary focus has been on JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang rather than Java. His seniority level (Staff Software Engineer) significantly exceeds the entry-level requirements for this role, which may lead to misalignment in expectations or engagement. While his agile methodology experience and technical depth are strong, his German language skills are basic, which is a required qualification for the role.
strengths: Deep expertise in agile development and software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD)
Strong background in object-oriented programming (C#, Java, DLang) and modern architectures
Proven track record in collaborative, team-based projects across diverse industries
concerns: Overqualified for an entry-level Junior Java Developer position
Primary expertise in languages other than Java (TypeScript, DLang, Node.js)
